case_title: STEPHEN O''MARA ET AL VS. TICARD BOWSER ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'MARA, STEPHEN O'MARA, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT BOWSER, TICARD DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-22-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-30-2020

PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64646802) FILED BY DEFENDANT BOWSER, TICARD
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-09-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100105109) AS TO DEFENDANT BOWSER, TICARD

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR ON NOV-09-2020 IN DEPT. 206 - MICHAEL LEVINSON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL. COUNSEL CONFIRMED WITH THE COURT THAT THE NAMED DEFENDANT HAS BEEN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, BUT THAT THERE ARE ONE OR TWO POSSIBLE DOE DEFENDANTS THEY ARE STILL INVESTIGATING. THE COURT DISMISSED THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THE NAMED DEFENDANT, TICARD BOWSER. THE COURT DID NOT DISMISS ANY OF THE DOE DEFENDANTS, NOT EVEN AT ISSUE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
